text_block_list.text:
I'm working in my office when Gold City enters
looking exhausted.
choice_data_list: Aren't you supposed to be in class?
Aren't you supposed to be in class?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll go to class after, so can you just let
me chill here a little?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I don't want anyone to see me slipping. Can't
have them worrying about me or thinking I'm not
good enough.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I know I can't keep on like this, but... I just can't muster up the motivation... Sigh...

She must be burnt out from all the races I've had
her in. It might be better to review her schedule
looking forward.
